name: Fyne
description: Cross-platform GUI toolkit for Go that builds beautiful native apps for desktop, mobile, and web from one codebase.

seo.title: Fyne — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Fyne: Cross-platform GUI toolkit for Go that builds beautiful native apps for desktop, mobile, and web from one codebase.

when_to_use: Cross-platform Go desktop app with a single codebase
Native macOS and Windows app built entirely in Go
Internal DevOps tool with a GUI running on all platforms
Open-source utility distributed as a native desktop binary
Mobile + desktop productivity app from one Go repository

cons: Widget set thinner than Qt or GTK
Mobile support less mature than desktop
review.verdict: The friendliest Go GUI toolkit today — perfect if you want single-binary apps without C dependencies.
review.best_for: Go developers shipping cross-platform desktop tools in a single binary
review.not_for: Teams needing true native platform look or rich widget ecosystems

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
